actions.action: Use this as a timely social-reply angle: office sweepstake readers can also pick 3 teams free on mobile. Post only on allowed comments or social shares.
actions.copy:
Pick 3 teams free for WorldCup26 and watch your private points preview. Paid leaderboard entry only needs a ticket later. Code 26BC4B90CB
https://worldcup26.world/login?ref=26BC4B90CB&utm_source=fourfourtwo&utm_medium=manual-comment&utm_campaign=worldcup26_public_outreach&utm_content=fresh_sweepstake_f21
actions.proofCommand: node campaign-public-channel-attempts.mjs --add --owner "Sienna" --platform "FourFourTwo" --channel "World Cup 2026 sweepstake kit article" --status "posted" --attempt-url "https://www.fourfourtwo.com/competition/world-cup-2026-sweepstakes-kit-download-and-print-our-sweepstake-template" --detail "public-url-or-screenshot-note: FourFourTwo/social comment URL or screenshot note with code/link included at YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm EEST"
actions.proofInstruction: public-url-or-screenshot-note: FourFourTwo/social comment URL or screenshot note with code/link included

actions.action: Post the story card with a link sticker and referral code.
actions.copy:
48 teams are still open. Pick your 3 before everyone copies the favorites. Code 26BC4B90CB
https://worldcup26.world/login?ref=26BC4B90CB&utm_source=instagram-facebook-story&utm_medium=manual-post&utm_campaign=worldcup26_public_outreach&utm_content=story_a3
actions.proofCommand: node campaign-proof-log.mjs --priority "3" --proof-url "private-meta-story: story posted from <account>; screenshot saved; code/link sticker included at YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm EEST" --status "posted"
actions.proofInstruction: private-meta-story: story posted from <account>; screenshot saved; code/link sticker included

actions.action: Use prepared reply style: React to prediction
actions.copy:
That is a bold pick. I built a small WorldCup26 game for this exact debate: pick 3 teams, track points, then join the paid leaderboard only if you want.

Free picks first:
https://worldcup26.world/login?ref=26BC4B90CB&utm_source=x&utm_medium=manual-reply&utm_campaign=worldcup26_football_openclaw&utm_content=soccer-fans-world-cup-2026_bold-prediction

Code: 26BC4B90CB
actions.proofCommand: node campaign-public-channel-attempts.mjs --add --owner "Sienna" --platform "X" --channel "football manual replies" --status "replied" --attempt-url "<real-x-reply-url-or-private-note>" --detail "Manual X reply from david2015bestai@gmail.com at YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm EEST; target=<@handle or tweet URL>; search='soccer fans world cup 2026'; code 26BC4B90CB and WorldCup26 link included" --next-action "watch replies, then run campaign-referral-activity.mjs after 15 minutes"
actions.proofInstruction: real X reply URL or precise private proof note
